testimonials.review1: Amazing resort with stunning views! The staff was incredibly friendly and the beach was pristine. Highly recommend!
testimonials.review2: Best vacation ever! The rooms were luxurious and the food was exceptional. Can't wait to come back!
testimonials.review3: Perfect location, beautiful resort, and excellent service. Everything exceeded our expectations!

chatbot.subtitle: Available 24/7
chatbot.welcomeMessage:
Welcome to El Kheima Beach Resort! 🏖️

I'm your smart assistant, ready to help with:

🏨 Room & suite bookings
🏖️ Beach & activities info
🍽️ Restaurant reservations
💰 Prices & special offers
📍 Location & directions

How can I help you today?

faq.seo_description: Answers to the most common questions about El Kheima Resort - booking, pricing, services, and more.
faq.seo_keywords: FAQ, El Kheima Resort, booking, Sharm El Sheikh
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about El Kheima Resort
faq.cta_text: Didn't find your answer? Contact us directly

items.q: How do I make a reservation?
items.a: You can book online through our website or WhatsApp us at {phone}
Yes, free cancellation up to 3 days before your booking date.

items.q: Is there an early bird discount?
items.a: Yes! Book 7+ days ahead for 15% off, 14+ days for 20% off.

items.q: What are the beach opening hours?
items.a: Beach is open daily from 8 AM to sunset.

items.q: What activities are available at the beach?
items.a: Diving, snorkeling, parasailing, jet ski, and boat trips.

items.q: Is there a group discount for beach access?
items.a: 5+ guests: 10% off. 10+ guests: 15% off. 20+ guests: 25% off.

items.q: What time is check-in and check-out?

items.a: Yes, free high-speed WiFi in all rooms and common areas.

items.q: Can I host a wedding at the resort?
items.a: Yes! We offer beach weddings for up to 200 guests. Contact us for a quote.
Yes, we offer team building, conferences, and product launches.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Cash, credit cards, Vodafone Cash, and bank transfer.
Yes, 30% deposit is required to confirm your booking.

paymentMock.test_mode_notice: Test mode - no real money is charged
paymentMock.test_gateway_notice: This is a test payment gateway. In production, you will be redirected to {provider}.

trackBooking.seo_title: Track Your Booking | El Kheima Resort
trackBooking.seo_description: Easily track your booking status at El Kheima Resort using your booking reference.
trackBooking.seo_keywords: track booking, El Kheima Resort, booking status
trackBooking.title: Track Your Booking
trackBooking.subtitle: Enter your booking reference to check its status
trackBooking.help_text: Your booking reference is in the confirmation message you received
trackBooking.invalid_format: Invalid booking reference format. Example: RM-A3F2B1C4
trackBooking.not_found: No booking found with this reference. Please check the number and try again.

privacy.seo_description: Privacy policy for El Kheima Beach Resort
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_body: We collect the information you provide when booking or registering: name, email address, phone number. We also automatically collect usage data to improve your experience.
privacy.section2_item2: Improving our services and user experience
privacy.section2_item3: Sending promotional offers (you can unsubscribe at any time)
privacy.section3_body: We do not sell your data to third parties. We only share data with necessary service providers (payment gateway, email service) under strict confidentiality agreements.
privacy.section4_body: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze usage via Google Analytics and Meta Pixel. You can control cookie settings from your browser.
privacy.section5_body: You have the right to request access to, modification, or deletion of your data. Contact us at:
privacy.section6_body: El Kheima Beach Resort — Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt

terms.seo_description: Terms and conditions of use for El Kheima Beach Resort
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.section1_item1: A booking is considered confirmed after the deposit is paid (30% of the total)
terms.section1_item2: The remaining amount is paid upon arrival
terms.section2_item3: Cancellation within 24 hours or no-show: no refund
terms.section3_item1: Outside food and drinks are not permitted
terms.section3_item2: Check-in and check-out times must be respected
terms.section3_item3: Respect others and keep the premises clean
terms.section4_body: The resort is not responsible for loss or damage of personal belongings. We recommend not bringing valuable items.
terms.section5_body: El Kheima Beach Resort — Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt

qr.status_in_kitchen: Your order is in the kitchen 👨‍🍳
qr.poll_error: Couldn't update order status — check your internet connection

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Integrated Resort Management System
login.twoFaHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator or Authy)
login.twoFaInvalid: That authenticator code is invalid or has expired.
login.recoveryCodeHint: Enter one unused recovery code exactly as saved.
login.recoveryCodeInvalid: That recovery code is invalid or has already been used.
login.enrollmentTokenPlaceholder: One-time token from the authorized operator
login.enrollmentTokenHint: This separate token is issued once by an authorized operator and is never your password.
login.enrollmentTokenInvalid: The enrollment token is missing, invalid, or expired.
login.enrollmentNotProvisioned: Secure enrollment is not provisioned for this account. Contact an authorized operator.
login.footer: El Kheima Beach — Resort OS v1.0

password.title: Secure account setup
password.reason: This account is using a temporary credential. Replace it before accessing resort operations.
password.requirements: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
password.failed: The password could not be changed. Check the temporary credentials and try again.
password.successBody: All existing sessions were closed. Sign in again with the new password and the same enrollment token to finish two-factor setup.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.mandatory: Required for this role before operational access is granted.
twoFactor.bindingExplanation: For your protection, binding a new authenticator requires a recent password check or the separate operator-issued enrollment token.
twoFactor.currentPasswordRequired: Enter your current password before starting setup.
twoFactor.stepOne: Open an authenticator app on your phone.
twoFactor.stepTwo: Scan the QR code, or enter the manual key.
twoFactor.stepThree: Enter the six-digit code shown in the app.
twoFactor.qrAlt: QR code for binding the authenticator app
twoFactor.qrFailed: The QR image could not be displayed. Use the manual key below; no internet connection is required.
twoFactor.codeRequired: Enter the six-digit code from the authenticator app.
twoFactor.invalidCode: The code is invalid or has expired.
twoFactor.enabled: Two-factor authentication is enabled on this account.
twoFactor.recoveryBody: Each code works once. Store them separately from your phone. Resort OS stores only hashes and cannot show these exact codes again. When signing in again, wait for a fresh authenticator code.
twoFactor.savedConfirmation: I stored these recovery codes in a secure place separate from my authenticator device.
twoFactor.signInAgain: I saved them — sign in again
twoFactor.regenerateWarning: Regenerating immediately invalidates every previous recovery code and closes existing sessions.
twoFactor.regenerateFailed: Recovery codes could not be regenerated.
twoFactor.disableWarning: Disabling lowers account security and closes current sessions. Confirm with your password and current authenticator code.
twoFactor.disableFailed: Two-factor authentication could not be disabled.
twoFactor.cannotDisableMandatory: This role requires two-factor authentication and cannot disable it.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll send a reset link to your email address
forgotPassword.successMessage: If that email address is registered with us, you'll receive a password reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder too.
forgotPassword.error: Please enter the email address linked to your account

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully — you'll be redirected to the login page in a few seconds
resetPassword.noToken: Invalid link — please open the link directly from the email
resetPassword.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

layout.languageSaveFailed: Could not save your language, please try again

profile.title: My Profile
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

stepUp.title: Confirm Your Identity
stepUp.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly explain the reason for this action...
stepUp.reasonRequired: A reason is required (at least 3 characters)
stepUp.recoveryPlaceholder: One of your backup recovery codes
stepUp.errorCodeRequired: Enter an authenticator code or a recovery code
stepUp.errorCodeInvalid: Code is incorrect or already used — wait for a new code from your authenticator app and try again
stepUp.errorMandatory2FA: Your account requires two-factor authentication to be enabled before this action
stepUp.errorGeneric: Could not confirm your identity — check your details and try again
stepUp.errorInvalidRestart: Your identity confirmation expired or was already used — please confirm again

permissions.title: Detailed Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Grant a specific employee an exception beyond their role's normal permissions, or deny them an action they'd normally be allowed — takes effect immediately without changing their base role.
permissions.selectEmployeePrompt: Select an employee from the list to view and edit their permissions
permissions.superAdminProtected: super_admin accounts are always protected — their permissions cannot be restricted or changed from here
permissions.toastReverted: "{label}" reverted to the role's default behavior
permissions.toastErrorSave: An error occurred while saving — try again
permissions.toastErrorLoadUserPerms: Could not load this employee's permissions
permissions.loadErrorCatalog: Could not load the permissions catalog — check your connection and try again
permissions.loadErrorUsers: Could not load the employee list — check your connection and try again
permissions.needs2FABody: Your account requires two-factor authentication (2FA) before accessing permissions management.
permissions.needs2FAHint: Go to Settings → Security and enable two-factor authentication, then come back to this page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Current branch settings — changes save immediately when you press "Save"
settings.loadError: Could not load settings — check your connection and try again
settings.keyRequired: You must enter a key first
settings.keyExists: Key "{key}" already exists — edit it from the table below
settings.noSettingsTitle: No settings for this branch yet
settings.noSettingsSubtitle: Add the first setting from the form above
settings.customSettingNote: Custom setting — no description registered for it on this screen.
settings.toastErrorCreate: Could not create the new setting — try again
settings.branchContextWarning: Your account isn't formally linked to a specific branch yet — the settings shown here are for a default branch and may not reflect your actual branch. Contact an administrator to link your account to a branch.

msg.selectOrEnterSupplier: Select a registered supplier or enter a supplier name
